use_cases: Filtering content by selected tags in SaaS dashboards and admin panels
Selecting multiple technology tags for developer profiles or project metadata
Categorizing content with customizable topic labels in content management systems
Building multi-select chip interfaces for form submissions and search filters
Managing selectable taxonomy terms for articles, products, or resource libraries
ai_summary: An animated tag selection component that allows users to pick from a pool of available tags and manage selected items with smooth Framer Motion transitions. Supports both controlled and uncontrolled state patterns, includes dark mode theming, and uses a clean minimalist design with blue accents. Ideal for SaaS applications requiring tag-based filtering, categorization, or metadata management interfaces.
